notableEvents.label: Austin Hedges GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Austin Hedges grounds into a double play, third baseman Alec Bohm to second baseman Bryson Stott to first baseman Bryce Harper. Steven Kwan out at 2nd. Austin Hedges out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Chase DeLauter GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Chase DeLauter grounds into a double play, first baseman Bryce Harper to shortstop Trea Turner. Travis Bazzana out at 2nd. Chase DeLauter out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Daniel Schneemann reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Daniel Schneemann reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Alec Bohm.

notableEvents.label: Justin Crawford pinch-hit
